brand_identity: Dark cybersecurity hacker aesthetic. Real automated attack tool look. Powerful, stealthy, authoritative.

typography.strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' (Tech / Art) - Radical weight contrast + Developer UI focus

spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) to maximize density and data correlation.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data, tables, and terminal outputs. Center only for empty states.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) for interactive elements.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#111622), 1px solid border (#1A2235). On hover: border-green-500/50 with drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,255,65,0.2)].
surface_strategies.terminal_window: Deep black background (#000000 or #05070A), font-mono, text-green-500, with optional CSS scanlines repeating-linear-gradient overlay.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid background (#05070A) with a hard 1px bottom border (#1A2235). No glassmorphism.
surface_strategies.active_states: Use 'The Tracing Beam' strategy for active scans (animated glowing border).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color. E.g., hover:bg-green-500 hover:text-black.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Snappy and mechanical. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.terminal_text: Typing effects for AI analysis or incoming scan data to simulate real-time hacker tool output.

components_customization.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast. Primary button: bg-green-500 text-black font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-green-400.
components_customization.inputs: bg-[#111622] border-[#1A2235] text-white focus:border-green-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500 rounded-none.
components_customization.tables: Dense rows. Header text uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400. 1px bottom border for rows.
components_customization.badges: Square. Danger: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/50. Warning: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/50.
components_customization.dialogs: Dark overlay (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm). Modal bg #111622, hard 1px border #1A2235.

icons_and_assets.rules: Use stroke-width 1.5. Colors should match the text or status (e.g., green for success/active, red for critical vulnerabilities).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Terminal green (#00FF41) on black (#05070A) easily passes.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-scan-button').

dashboard_home.layout: Control room grid. Top row: Key stats (Active Scans, Critical CVEs, Auto-Pwn Targets). Middle: Real-time scan activity chart. Bottom: Recent findings table.
dashboard_home.visuals: Dense data, use high-contrast badges for vulnerabilities.

new_scan.layout: Split layout. Left: Target input and configuration form. Right: AI Mode Recommendation panel with terminal-style breakdown of what the scan will do.
new_scan.visuals: Inputs with sharp borders, glowing focus rings. 'Launch Scan' as a massive, high-contrast CTA.

scan_monitor.layout: Vertical split. Left (60%): Real-time Terminal Output Stream (black bg, green monospace). Right (40%): AI Live Analysis panel summarizing findings as they appear.
scan_monitor.visuals: Terminal must have sticky scroll, scanline overlay. AI panel uses 'Tracing Beam' border to show active thinking.

attack_plan.layout: Timeline or step-by-step node graph. Each phase (Recon, Exploit, Post-Exploitation) clearly marked with executable commands.
attack_plan.visuals: Use dashed lines connecting phases. Executable commands in 'Retro-Futurism' code blocks with 'Copy' or 'Auto-Execute' buttons.

results_loot.layout: Data table heavy. Filters on top (Severity, Host, Port). Expandable rows for detailed CVE mapping and extracted credentials.
results_loot.visuals: Use colors strictly for severity (Red=Critical, Orange=High, Yellow=Medium, Blue=Low).

workspaces.layout: Grid of cards. Each card represents a workspace/target.
workspaces.visuals: Cards have 1px borders. Hover lifts the card slightly with a subtle green ambient shadow.

hero_background.description: Abstract green matrix code background with binary style.
hero_background.usage: Use with low opacity (10-20%) as a subtle texture behind the 'New Scan' configuration panel or empty states.

alert_texture.description: Dynamic abstract scene with red neon lights and geometric patterns.
alert_texture.usage: Use as a background layer for the 'Attack Plan' or 'Critical Vulnerability' modal with heavy black gradient overlay (bg-black/80).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Retro-Futurism/Terminal visual aesthetic. This is a hacker tool, not a consumer SaaS.
Do not use generic Shadcn styling. Override border radii to 0 or 2px max, use the defined dark background colors.
Implement the 'Terminal Stream' with actual monospace fonts and a raw HTML/Tailwind styling to look like a real CLI.
Use JetBrains Mono for all headings and data points. IBM Plex Sans for long-form reading text.
Ensure all buttons and inputs have a data-testid attribute.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex/overlapping layouts, and Shadcn ONLY for interactive logic (customizing its styles heavily).
Limit the use of the primary green color to CTAs and active states to maintain its impact.
